title: 美國參議員羅姆尼：我支持香港人追求自由和自治

replies.msg:
Protests in Hong Kong are further exposing China’s relentless campaign of repression, censorship, and the imprisonment of millions. I support the people of Hong Kong in their quest for freedom and autonomy. The Chinese Communist Party and the military should stay in Beijing.

https://mobile.twitter.com/SenatorRomney/status/1161347634696728584

The worth of freedom is most clear when it is won, or when it is lost; the passion and courage of the people of Hong Kong remind us of freedom’s precious strain. Their fight is our fight. Pray they succeed.

https://mobile.twitter.com/SenatorRomney/status/1161637239509700609

雖然美國佬都係競選先講嘢幫我地，但係都好幫到手

唔好意思，借推一下，大學生請入
